title: Complete math assignment with 10 problems
description: Read chapter 4 and solve the 10 problems at the end of the chapter. Ensure all work is shown for partial credit.

sections.heading: Preparation
sections.content: Get your textbook and a clean sheet of paper.

title: Write English essay draft
description: Write a 500-word draft about the themes in Macbeth. Focus on ambition and guilt.

sections.heading: Drafting
sections.content: Write the 500 words without worrying about perfection.
